title: Telegram Marketing Expert for iGaming
desc:
Job Description: Telegram Ads & Growth Executive – iGaming (India Market)
Job Title: Telegram Marketing Executive / Telegram Ads & Community Manager
Location: Srilanka or Remote
Department: Marketing / Growth
Reports To: Marketing Manager / Growth Head
Employment Type: Full-time
________________________________________
About the Role
We are looking for a hands-on Telegram Marketing Executive to own our Telegram-based user acquisition and community engagement strategy for the India market. This role blends performance marketing (running paid Telegram ads in-house), community management (Telegram groups/channels), and light technical build-out (bots and mini apps). You'll also act as the internal point of contact for external agencies managing paid Telegram campaigns on our behalf.
Key Responsibilities
●	Run Telegram Ads In-House: Plan, launch, and optimize paid ad campaigns directly on Telegram Ads platform (Telegram Ad Network) targeting the India market — audience targeting, budget allocation, creative testing, and performance tracking.
●	Group & Channel Management: Create, grow, and manage Telegram groups/channels — moderation, engagement strategy, content calendar, and retention activities to keep communities active and compliant.
●	Bot Development: Build and maintain Telegram bots for use cases such as onboarding, promotions, customer support, referral tracking, or automated engagement.
●	Mini App Development: Design and develop Telegram Mini Apps to enhance user experien

title: Commission-Based Sales Partner Wanted — SaaS MVP Development (Not a Freelance Job) -- 2
desc:
What This Partnership Is

You own outreach & lead generation
You find and qualify real, paying clients
I handle project scoping, development, and delivery
You earn 20-30% commission on every project that's successfully closed and paid
Commission is paid only after the client pays (no upfront or fixed salary)

Typical Services

SaaS MVPs for startups (auth, payments, core features)
Production-ready web applications — not prototypes or throwaway demos
Custom web solutions for small businesses

Typical Project Value

$2,500 – $4,000 per project (temporary early-stage pricing while I build a paid client track record — will increase as testimonials/portfolio grow, and your commission grows with it)
Your commission: ~$500 – $1,200 per deal today, with room to grow as pricing increases

Your Responsibilities

Lead generation & outreach (LinkedIn, cold email, referrals, communities, etc.)
Identifying founders/businesses that need an MVP or web app
Initial client conversations & qualification (budget, real project, timeline)
Handing over qualified leads for final scoping & closing

What I Provide

Real, live shipped products as proof of work (portfolio available on request)
Clear pricing ranges and fast turnaround (3-5 week MVPs)
Professional communication and delivery
Written commission terms before we start — clear on payout timing and deal tracking

title: LinkedIn Lead Generation for SaaS
desc:
I run a SaaS-based ERP solution built specifically for MSMEs and I want our LinkedIn presence to become a steady source of qualified leads from small business owners. The company page is already set up; what’s missing is the consistent, strategic handling that keeps us top-of-mind in their feeds and funnels them toward a demo or trial.

Here’s what I’m looking for:

• Refresh and fully optimise the company profile so benefits for small business owners are immediately clear.  
• Develop a rolling content calendar that blends educational how-tos, product-led insights, short success snippets and the occasional industry update—all written to spark conversation and direct readers to our landing pages.  
• Manage day-to-day posting, comment moderation and targeted connection growth, ensuring every interaction serves the wider goal of lead capture.  
• Set up and monitor LinkedIn analytics, then adjust copy, visuals and posting times based on performance data.  
• Provide concise monthly reports highlighting follower growth, engagement metrics and—most importantly—leads generated.

Familiarity with LinkedIn Campaign Manager, Sales Navigator and scheduling tools (Buffer, Hootsuite or similar) will help you hit the ground running. If you’ve already turned other B2B SaaS pages into lead machines, show me the numbers and let’s get started.

title: Nvivo Coding and Comprehensive Thematic Analysis
desc: Nvivo coding and thematic analysis. I will provide the raw data. I need the full output raw coding then full chapter analysis of finding with diagrams and tables and references

title: Virtual Assistant for Job Search Assistance -- 2
desc:
I'm looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support my job search on a consistent daily/weekly basis. The goal is to increase the volume and organization of applications to relevant opportunities while I focus on interview preparation and other priorities.

This is not a manual grind. You'll work on our own platform, where AI automation already handles roughly 70–80% of the repetitive work for you. Your job is the remaining human part — reviewing, confirming, tailoring where needed, and keeping everything organized. It's a much easier and more convenient working environment than typical VA gigs, and it's easy to learn.

Key Responsibilities

- Review and confirm AI-surfaced job openings on major platforms (LinkedIn, Indeed, company career pages, etc.) that match my target roles, skills, and preferences.
- Assist with preparing and submitting applications, tailoring where appropriate using provided materials and the platform's automation.
- Maintain organized tracking of all submissions — job links, dates, status, and any responses received.
- Provide regular reports (daily or weekly) with clear summaries and proof of work completed.
- Suggest improvements to the process based on trends you observe.
- Handle basic follow-up and light research on companies/recruiters when requested.


Who I'm Looking For

I need a specific character of person:


- Strong attention to detail and excellent organizational skills.
- Responsible and reliable — delivers on time,

title: Maldives Drone Video Edit
desc:
I need a calm and relaxing music video created from our Maldives trip drone footage. The video should highlight the stunning beaches, ocean views, sunrises, and sunsets and our love.

Requirements:
- Seamless integration of classical music
- Emphasis on tranquil, scenic beauty
- High-quality editing skills

Ideal Skills:
- Experience with drone video editing
- Proficiency in video editing software
- Strong sense of timing and aesthetics

Please submit samples of similar work.

title: Informational Copywriting Bullet Points Needed
desc:
I’m putting together a series of short, punchy bullet points that will appear across brochures, landing pages, and quick-scan cheat sheets. The goal is purely informational—I’m not looking for heavy sales language, just clear value statements that help readers grasp the essentials at a glance.

You’ll be working in classic copywriting style: tight phrasing, active voice, and a friendly yet authoritative tone. Each bullet should stand on its own, read naturally in plain text or on a graphic, and avoid jargon or filler.

Deliverables  
• 40 unique bullet points, 8–12 words each, grouped by theme (service quality, turnaround, accuracy, support, etc.)  
• A short rationale document explaining the angle and word choice for each group  
• Up to two revision passes within 48 hours of feedback

Acceptance criteria  
• Every bullet communicates one clear benefit or fact, written for an English-speaking audience at roughly Grade-8 reading level  
• No repeated phrasing or clichés  
• Final copy delivered in an editable Google Doc

I’ll supply brand guidelines and any reference material you need as soon as we start. If concise, reader-friendly messaging is your strong suit, I’d love to see a quick sample line or two in your bid.

title: Creative Story Writer Wanted
desc:
I have a fresh concept in mind and need a skilled writer to turn it into an engaging, fully-fleshed story. I’m flexible on genre, target audience, and tone, so feel free to pitch what you do best—whether that’s a whimsical children’s tale, a gripping mystery, or a sweeping fantasy adventure. The key is a captivating narrative arc, believable characters, and polished prose that keeps readers turning pages.
​"I have a particular interest in a wide variety of storytelling, ranging from heartwarming, lovely romance narratives to intense, high-stakes gangster and action sagas. I am looking for a writer who is versatile enough to capture these different moods and tones effectively."
After we agree on the direction, you’ll draft the manuscript and refine it based on my feedback. Please share a brief proposal describing your preferred genre, estimated word count, and a short outline of how you would approach the story. Links to previous fiction samples are highly appreciated so I can get a feel for your style.

Acceptance criteria for the final deliverable:  
• Original content (plagiarism-free, rights transferred on payment)  
• Complete, edited manuscript in Word or Google Docs  
• A concise one-paragraph synopsis summarizing plot and theme  

If you love crafting imaginative stories and can meet deadlines comfortably, I look forward to collaborating with you.

title: 24/7 Zendesk Canlı Destek
desc:
İşleyen bir bahis sitesi için 24/7 hizmet verecek canlı destek altyapısını Zendesk üzerinde kurmak istiyorum. Ziyaretçilerin sitede anlık olarak operatöre bağlanabileceği, mesaj geçmişinin saklanacağı ve raporlamaların takip edilebileceği eksiksiz bir yapı hedefliyorum.  

telegram:mertakyildizz

Beklediğim adımlar:  
• Zendesk hesabının kurulumu ve lisans ayarları  
• Chat widget’ının siteye kod entegrasyonu (masaüstü + mobil uyumlu)  
• Karşılama mesajları, tetikleyiciler ve otomatik yönlendirme kuralları  
• Sık sorulan sorular için hazır cevap şablonları  
• Operatör rollerinin ve çalışma saatlerinin 24/7 destek akışına göre yapılandırılması  
• Temel raporlama panellerinin aktif edilmesi  
• Kullanmamız gereken IP/alan adı doğrulamaları veya ek eklenti varsa kurulumu  
• Kısa bir kullanım dokümanı ve 30 dakikalık çevrim içi eğitim oturumu  

Kurulum tamamlandığında site ziyaretçilerinin kesintisiz sohbet başlatabildiğini ve operatör ekranında tüm mesajların doğru sırada göründüğünü birlikte test edeceğiz. Teknik tarafta HTML, JavaScript veya API entegrasyonu gerekiyorsa yönlendirmelerinizi takip etmeye hazırım; kod erişimini sağlayacağım.  

Hızlı ve temiz bir teslimat yapabilecek, Zendesk Live Chat konusunda deneyimli profesyonellerden teklif bekliyorum.

title: European Food Culture & Regional Cuisine Guide Adaptation into German
desc:
I have English material about European food culture and traditional regional cuisines. The content is informative but currently written in a quite plain, factual style. I need it adapted into natural, engaging German that feels warm and authentic to German readers.
The guide covers food traditions, regional specialties, cooking methods, cultural background, and how food connects to European identity and daily life.
What Needs to Be Done

Rewrite the full guide into natural, well-flowing German
Keep all cultural information, recipes, and regional details accurate
Make the language pleasant to read and suitable for a general audience
Give it a more storytelling and cultural feel rather than dry facts

Sample Task (include your version when you apply)
Please adapt the short English section below into natural German. Show your adaptation in your proposal.
Original Section:
In many parts of Europe, food is more than just something to eat. In Italy, for example, lunch is often the biggest meal of the day and is shared with family. In France, cheese and wine are not just products but part of the national identity. Each region has its own specialties that have been passed down for generations.
Deliverables

Full German version of the guide (approximately 8–12 pages)
Natural and engaging German throughout
Clean Word document

Quality Standards

The German must read naturally and feel culturally appropriate
All original information about food and culture must stay accurate
The tone sho

title: Influencer Outreach Specialist for Wedrip
desc:
I run Wedrip (wedrip.in), a merch agency that helps YouTube and Instagram creators launch their own merch brands end-to-end (design, production, store setup, fulfilment).

I'm looking for a human-led outreach specialist to help us connect with the right creators and invite them into a revenue-share merch program.

What I need:
- Identify YouTube/Instagram creators with strong communities but little/no existing merch (I'll provide a clear ICP)
- Run manual cold outreach via email + DMs under our brand (personalised, not spam blasts)
- Book qualified calls or get explicit "yes, I'm interested" replies from creators

Important: this is NOT a typical "brand pays creator per post" campaign. Creators earn via revenue share on merch sales. Your job is to pitch this model to them and bring me interested, qualified creators.

Ideal freelancer:
- Experience with influencer outreach or B2B lead generation
- Comfortable running cold outreach and following a tested script
- Open to a pilot with performance-based pay (bonus per signed creator)

Compensation: This is commission-based only. You will be paid a bonus for every creator who signs and launches a merch program with us. No retainer, no upfront fee — pure performance.oom walkthrough once we connect.
